name: count on me
trans: 靠近我
phonetic: /kaʊnt ɒn miː/

name: If you ever find yourself stuck in the middle of the sea.
trans: 如果你发现自己被困在大海中央。
phonetic: /ɪf juː ˈevə faɪnd jɔːˈself stʌk ɪn ðə ˈmɪdl ɒv ðə siː/

name: I'll sail the world to find you.
trans: 我会航行全世界去寻找你。
phonetic: /aɪl seɪl ðə wɜːld tuː faɪnd juː/

name: If you ever find yourself lost in the dark and you can't see.
trans: 如果你发现自己迷失在黑暗中，什么也看不见。
phonetic: /ɪf juː ˈevə faɪnd jɔːˈself lɒst ɪn ðə dɑːk ænd juː kænt siː/

name: I'll be the light to guide you.
trans: 我会成为光芒指引你。
phonetic: /aɪl biː ðə laɪt tuː ɡaɪd juː/

name: You can count on me like one two three.
trans: 你可以像数1、2、3一样依靠我。
phonetic: /juː kæn kaʊnt ɒn miː laɪk wʌn tuː θriː/

name: I'll be there.
trans: 我会在你身边。
phonetic: /aɪl biː ðeə/

name: And I know when I need it.
trans: 而我知道当我需要的时候。
phonetic: /ænd aɪ nəʊ wen aɪ niːd ɪt/

name: I can count on you like four three two.
trans: 我也可以像数4、3、2一样依靠你。
phonetic: /aɪ kæn kaʊnt ɒn juː laɪk fɔː θriː tuː/

name: You'll be there.
trans: 你也会在我身边。
phonetic: /juːl biː ðeə/

name: Cause that's what friends are supposed to do.
trans: 因为朋友本就该如此。
phonetic: /kɔːz ðæts wɒt frendz ɑː(r) səˈpəʊzd tuː duː/

name: If you're tossing and you're turning and you just can't fall asleep.
trans: 如果你辗转反侧，无法入睡。
phonetic: /ɪf jʊə ˈtɒsɪŋ ænd jʊə ˈtɜːnɪŋ ænd juː dʒʌst kænt fɔːl əˈsliːp/

name: I'll sing a song beside you.
trans: 我会在你身边唱一首歌。
phonetic: /aɪl sɪŋ ə sɒŋ bɪˈsaɪd juː/

name: And if you ever forget how much you really mean to me.
trans: 如果你忘了你对我有多重要。
phonetic: /ænd ɪf juː ˈevə fəˈɡet haʊ mʌtʃ juː ˈriːəli miːn tuː miː/

name: Every day I will remind you.
trans: 我每天都会提醒你。
phonetic: /ˈevri deɪ aɪ wɪl rɪˈmaɪnd juː/

name: lenom tree
trans: 柠檬树
phonetic: /ˈlemən triː/

name: I'm wasting my time, I got nothing to do.
trans: 我在消磨时间，无事可做。
phonetic: /aɪm ˈweɪstɪŋ maɪ taɪm, aɪ ɡɒt ˈnʌθɪŋ tuː duː/

name: I'm hanging around, I'm waiting for you.
trans: 我四处闲逛，一直在等你。
phonetic: /aɪm ˈhæŋɪŋ əˈraʊnd, aɪm ˈweɪtɪŋ fɔː juː/

name: But nothing ever happens, and I wonder.
trans: 但什么都没发生，我感到迷茫。
phonetic: /bʌt ˈnʌθɪŋ ˈevə ˈhæpənz, ænd aɪ ˈwʌndə/

name: I'm driving around in my car.
trans: 我开着车四处转悠。
phonetic: /aɪm ˈdraɪvɪŋ əˈraʊnd ɪn maɪ kɑː/

name: I'm driving too fast, I'm driving too far.
trans: 我开得太快，开得太远。
phonetic: /aɪm ˈdraɪvɪŋ tuː fɑːst, aɪm ˈdraɪvɪŋ tuː fɑː/

name: I'd like to change my point of view.
trans: 我想换个视角看事情。
phonetic: /aɪd laɪk tuː tʃeɪndʒ maɪ pɔɪnt ɒv vjuː/

name: I feel so lonely, I'm waiting for you.
trans: 我感到无比孤单，一直在等你。
phonetic: /aɪ fiːl səʊ ˈləʊnli, aɪm ˈweɪtɪŋ fɔː juː/

name: But nothing ever happens, and I wonder.
trans: 但什么都没发生，我感到迷茫。
phonetic: /bʌt ˈnʌθɪŋ ˈevə ˈhæpənz, ænd aɪ ˈwʌndə/

name: I wonder how, I wonder why.
trans: 我不知道怎么回事，也不明白为什么。
phonetic: /aɪ ˈwʌndə haʊ, aɪ ˈwʌndə waɪ/

name: Yesterday you told me about the blue blue sky.
trans: 昨天你还跟我说起那片蓝蓝的天空。
phonetic: /ˈjestədeɪ juː təʊld miː əˈbaʊt ðə bluː bluː skaɪ/

name: And all that I can see is just a yellow lemon tree.
trans: 而我所能看见的，只是一棵黄色的柠檬树。
phonetic: /ænd ɔːl ðæt aɪ kæn siː ɪz dʒʌst ə ˈjeləʊ ˈlemən triː/

name: I'm turning my head up and down.
trans: 我把头上下甩动。
phonetic: /aɪm ˈtɜːnɪŋ maɪ hed ʌp ænd daʊn/

name: I'm turning turning turning turning turning around.
trans: 我转啊转啊转啊转啊转。
phonetic: /aɪm ˈtɜːnɪŋ ˈtɜːnɪŋ ˈtɜːnɪŋ ˈtɜːnɪŋ ˈtɜːnɪŋ əˈraʊnd/

name: And all that I can see is just another lemon tree.
trans: 我所能看见的，只是另一棵柠檬树。
phonetic: /ænd ɔːl ðæt aɪ kæn siː ɪz dʒʌst əˈnʌðə ˈlemən triː/

name: Love Story
trans: 爱情故事
phonetic: /lʌv ˈstɔːri/

name: We were both young when I first saw you.
trans: 当我第一次见到你时，我们都还年轻。
phonetic: /wi wɜːr boʊ jʌŋ wen fɜːrst sɔː juː/

name: I close my eyes and the flashback starts.
trans: 我闭上双眼，回忆开始浮现。
phonetic: /aɪ kloʊz maɪ ænd ðə ˈflæʃbæk stɑːrts/

name: Romeo, take me somewhere we can be alone.
trans: 罗密欧，带我去一个只有我们的地方。
phonetic: /ˈroʊmiˌoʊ, teɪk miː ˈsʌmwer wiː kæn biː əˈloʊn/

name: I'll be waiting, all there's left to do is run.
trans: 我会一直等待，剩下的只有逃离。
phonetic: /aɪl bi ˈweɪtɪŋ, ɔːl ðerz left tuː duː ɪz rʌn/

name: You Belong With Me
trans: 你属于我
phonetic: /juː bɪˈlɔːŋ wɪð miː/

name: She wears short skirts, I wear T-shirts.
trans: 她穿短裙，我穿T恤。
phonetic: /ʃi werz ʃɔːrt skɜːrts, aɪ werz ˈtiː ʃɜːrts/

name: She's cheer captain, and I'm on the bleachers.
trans: 她是啦啦队队长，而我坐在看台上。
phonetic: /ʃiːz tʃɪr ˈkæptən, ænd aɪm ɑːn ðə ˈbliːtʃərz/

name: You belong with me, belong with me.
trans: 你属于我，属于我。
phonetic: /juː bɪˈlɔːŋ wɪð miː, bɪˈlɔːŋ wɪð miː/

name: Better Man
trans: 更好的人
phonetic: /ˈbetər mæn/

name: I'll be a better man today.
trans: 今天我会成为一个更好的人。
phonetic: /aɪl biː ə ˈbetər mæn təˈdeɪ/

name: I'll be good to you, I'll be true to you.
trans: 我会对你好，对你真诚。
phonetic: /aɪl biː ɡʊd tuː juː, aɪl biː truː tuː juː/

name: I'll make a promise to you.
trans: 我会向你许下承诺。
phonetic: /aɪl meɪk ə ˈprɑːmɪs tuː juː/
